description: Style NoteA brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this casual shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with oxford shoes and crisp trousers for a look that exudes confidence.Product DetailsBlue shirt with slim buttoned down spread collar, full length buttoned placket, patch pocket on left chest, full length sleeve with buttoned cuffs, curved hem with brand patchMaterial and Care 100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverseSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
